generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands from Digital Twin Entity into motor voltage commands for controlling the vehicle's speed via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages steering adjustments via ROS2 nodes to maintain vehicle trajectory, ensuring compliance with ISO 15622 ACC control logic (Performance Class I)"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in vehicle's proximity (Hokuyo UST-10LX sensor)"
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time 3D environmental data for object perception and path projection (Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera)"
]

instance VehicleStateSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors ego vehicle's speed and steering angle in real-time for DT monitoring and control"
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection and tracking"
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Real-time 3D environmental data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for object perception"
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensors
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data (speed/steering) for monitoring and control"
]

// C5: Data Processing
instance DBSCANClustering : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point cloud data into object clusters using DBSCAN algorithm for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance KalmanFilterTracking : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracks detected objects using Kalman filter algorithm for accurate object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DBSCANClustering
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object track data (lead vehicle identification) derived from processed sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData KalmanFilterTracking
]

// C6: Models
instance ISO15622ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 (Performance Class I) speed adaptation logic based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance PointCloudProcessingPipeline : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Combines DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for comprehensive point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

// C7: Data Storage
instance HistoricalEgoStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical ego vehicle state and object track data for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFE
]

instance ObjectTrackHistoryDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical object track data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFE
]

// C8: Virtual Representation
instance ROS2VisualizationNode : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization data via ROS2 topics for projected driving paths and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OpenCVRenderingFE
]

// C9: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication, topic-based data exchange, and modular architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, ROS2VisualizationNode
]

instance PythonPrototyping : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of data processing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClustering, KalmanFilterTracking
]

instance CPlusPlusLifecycleManagement : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 lifecycle management of system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuation
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingPipeline
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom implementation of ISO 23247 Data Translation Feature for unit conversions, message alignment, and serialization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ISO15622ACCControlLogic, ObjectTrackData
]

instance OpenCVRenderingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OpenCV-based 3D rendering for real-time visualization of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2VisualizationNode
]

// C10: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed/steering), detected object tracks, and projected driving paths via 3D Visualization UI FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports (timeseries data) of object tracks and vehicle state via Reporting FE, stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalAnalysisInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECUs to DT Entity for scalability"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC system via Control Panel UI FE (enable/disable ACC, set speeds, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction
]

// C11: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of driving environment, vehicle state, and projected paths for operational awareness"
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical object tracks and vehicle states for performance optimization and predictive maintenance"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven adjustments to ACC parameters (desired speed, reaction times) for improved fuel efficiency or safety"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote triggering of emergency braking system via Control Panel UI FE"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Environment
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized deployment hosting all physical sensing and actuation components for the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensors, MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuation
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized deployment hosting all digital processing components (models, data processing, visualization)"
    base:contains ISO15622ACCControlLogic, PointCloudProcessingPipeline, DBSCANClustering, KalmanFilterTracking, DataTranslationFE, ROS2VisualizationNode
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized deployment hosting all user interface components"
    base:contains HistoricalEgoStateDatabase, ObjectTrackHistoryDatabase, OpenCVRenderingFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **ACC Control Outputs**: The DT computes desired speeds based on lead vehicle distance (via the **Controlling FE**) and sends commands to the vehicle’s motor/steering actuators via ROS2 topics.
  - **Remote Management Commands**: Users can enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, or trigger emergency braking through the **Control Panel UI FE**, which translates commands into ROS2 actions and propagates them to the Physical Twin Entity.
  - **Actuation FE**: Converts virtual speed commands into motor voltage signals for the Vedder Speed Controller, ensuring safe and precise actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time scales** with the following synchronization requirements:
  - **Data Collection Rate**: Object tracks and ego vehicle state are updated at **perception cycle frequencies** (typically <100 ms intervals) to match sensor refresh rates.
  - **End-to-End Latency**: Maximum **100 ms** from vehicle to DT Entity (3GPP 22.185 compliance) for real-time ACC control.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices are synchronized to an accuracy of **100 ms** (due to hardware limitations), ensuring event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of three primary entities (ISO 23247-inspired):
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor data processing (e.g., LiDAR clustering, actuation) and interfaces with the physical vehicle (steering/motor).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (Data Collecting FE), reporting (Reporting FE), and ACC control logic (Controlling FE). Acts as the central processing hub for offloaded computations.
  - **User Entity**: Provides two subcomponents:
    - **3D Visualization FE**: Displays real-time ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths.
    - **Control Panel FE**: Enables remote management (e.g., ACC enable/disable, emergency braking) via a web-based interface.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements the **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data compatibility."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC system development and validation (e.g., simulation of lead vehicle detection, path projection).
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., data-driven performance optimization) during vehicle operation.
  - **Representation Phase**: Covers the **as-operated** stage, providing real-time fidelity for operational use cases (e.g., ACC control, emergency braking)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-Time Fidelity**: LiDAR/depth camera data processed at <100 ms intervals to match perception cycles, ensuring accurate object tracking.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - **ISO 15622 Compliance**: ACC control logic validated against Performance Class I standards.
    - **Latency Testing**: End-to-end latency measured against 3GPP 22.185 (≤100 ms) for real-time safety.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **100 ms accuracy** (per hardware constraints) to prevent timing drift.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: DBSCAN/Kalman filtering mitigates sensor noise in object detection/tracking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **Network Protocols**: Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication (Physical Twin → DT Entity) and ROS2 topics for intra-entity data exchange.
  - **Communication Architecture**: Layered architecture with:
    - **Physical Layer**: Sensor data streams (LiDAR, depth camera) via ROS2 topics.
    - **Middleware Layer**: ROS2 for inter-component communication, Data Translation FE for message alignment.
    - **Application Layer**: User-facing services (UI, ACC control) deployed as ROS2 packages.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency capped at **100 ms** (3GPP 22.185) via optimized Wi-Fi and ROS2 networking."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Hardware**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (edge computing) for sensor processing and ROS2 execution.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on cloud/edge infrastructure (not specified in document) for offloaded computations (e.g., ACC control logic).
  - **User Entity**: Hosted on a remote server (not detailed) for visualization and remote management via web interface.
  - **Data Storage**: External SQL database (not specified) for storing historical vehicle state and object track data."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: Not explicitly detailed in the document, but could include:
    - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Communication**: Leverages 3GPP 22.185 for low-latency data exchange with other vehicles (e.g., lead vehicle tracking).
    - **Cloud Services**: Offloads compute-intensive tasks (e.g., AI simulations) to cloud platforms for scalability."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed as follows:
  - **Data Ownership**: The **physical twin owner** (vehicle manufacturer/operator) retains ownership of raw sensor data and vehicle state, while the DT service provider (research team) manages processed data for analysis.
  - **Privacy Measures**: Not explicitly detailed, but real-time data is transmitted securely over Wi-Fi (encrypted via ROS2 networking) and stored externally to minimize exposure."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows **ISO 23247** for architectural reference, with adaptations for automotive use (e.g., introducing a Physical Twin Entity). Additional standards include ISO 15622 (ACC), 3GPP 22.185 (V2V communication), and ROS2 (middleware)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Design**: ACC control logic adheres to ISO 15622 (Performance Class I) for safe following distance adjustments.
  - **Remote Operation**: Emergency braking commands are validated before execution to prevent unintended accidents.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency ≤100 ms (3GPP 22.185) ensures real-time responsiveness for critical operations.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators must explicitly confirm emergency braking commands via the Control Panel UI FE."
]
